comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://vod.sooplive.com/player/190526745](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fvod.sooplive.com%2Fplayer%2F190526745) ### Comment > 한국의 soop(숲)이라는 사이트에서 vod를 볼 때, 어제까지는 동영상 광고가 안 나왔습니다. > 그런데 오늘부터 vod를 볼 때, 동영상 광고가 나오기 시작했습니다. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5bz0iniju8kc40sgs4k0g408kk0cgswj8gdvd6xh5c.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.0.8 MV2 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Edge Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard German filter,
AdGuard Japanese filter,
AdGuard Spanish/Portuguese filter,
AdGuard French filter,
EasyList Thailand,
AdGuard Chinese filter,
List-KR,
YousList,
IndianList

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks Filters last update: | 2026-03-24T00:13:22 Tracking protection: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/import?product=ext&url=https%3A%2F%2Fvod.sooplive.com%2Fplayer%2F190526745&version=5.3.0.8&filters=AdGuard+Base+filter%2CAdGuard+Tracking+Protection+filter%2CAdGuard+Social+Media+filter%2CAdGuard+German+filter%2CAdGuard+Japanese+filter%2CAdGuard+Spanish%2FPortuguese+filter%2CAdGuard+French+filter%2CAdGuard+Cookie+Notices+filter%2CAdGuard+Popups+filter%2CAdGuard+Mobile+App+Banners+filter%2CAdGuard+Other+Annoyances+filter%2CAdGuard+Widgets+filter%2CEasyList+Thailand%2COnline+Malicious+URL+Blocklist%2CAdGuard+Chinese+filter%2CList-KR%2CYousList%2CIndianList%2CPhishing+URL+Blocklist%2CScam+Blocklist+by+DurableNapkin%2CuBlock+Origin+%E2%80%93+Badware+risks)

filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter`, `User rules (url: none)` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
